metadata.file_path: /Volumes/My Passport/Ojo otra vez musica de Tidal Original descarga/Consolidado2025/Tracks/Duran Duran - Rio (2009 Remaster).flac
metadata.title: Rio (2009 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:38.50] Moving on the floor now, babe
[00:40.81] You're a bird of paradise
[00:45.12] Cherry ice cream smile
[00:47.83] I suppose it's very nice
[00:51.39] With a step to your left and a flick to the right
[00:54.48] You catch that mirror way out west
[00:59.07] You know you're something special
[01:01.55] And you look like you're the best
[01:09.20] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[01:16.04] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[01:22.84] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[01:29.76] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[01:35.75] 
[01:50.09] I've seen you on the beach and I've seen you on TV
[01:57.18] Two of a billion stars, it means so much to me
[02:05.40] Like a birthday or a pretty view
[02:10.59] But then I'm sure that you know it's just for you
[02:20.86] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[02:27.64] Just like that river twisting through a dusty land
[02:34.50] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[02:41.29] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[02:47.68] 
[03:42.34] Hey now, ooh, look at that, did she nearly run you down?
[03:48.40] At the end of the drive, the lawmen arrive
[03:52.36] You make me feel alive, alive, alive
[03:57.99] I'll take my chance, 'cause luck is on my side or something
[04:04.07] I know what you're thinking
[04:05.80] I'll tell you something, I know what you're thinking
[04:13.14] Her name is Rio and she dances on the sand
[04:20.00] Just like that river twists across a dusty land
[04:26.81] And when she shines, she really shows you all she can
[04:33.70] Oh, Rio, Rio, dance across the Rio Grande
[04:40.51] Her name is Rio, she don't need to understand
[04:47.32] And I might find her if I'm looking like I can
[04:54.11] Oh, Rio, Rio, hear them shout across the land
[05:00.83] From mountains in the north down to the Rio Grande
[05:07.05]
